overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring Aloy riding a mechanical mount through snowy mountain terrain. The journey traverses mixed valleys with alien flora, ice canyons, combat with a mechanical beast, dramatic mountain vistas, and approaches a settlement with bioluminescent alien architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with alien flora

events.description: terrain transitions from mixed grass and snow to full snow coverage approaching ice canyon

agents.ego_description: riding mechanical mount through mixed terrain with red grass and purple alien plants, heading toward mountain pass

entered.detail: bioluminescent purple alien flora with bulbous growths
large gray rock formation with snow patches
waterfall visible in the misty distance between mountains
boulder blocking part of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide snowy mountain valley featuring distinctive purple alien flora and red grass patches mixed with snow. The character rides a mechanical mount along a winding path surrounded by rocky cliffs, heading toward a narrow ice canyon entrance visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow ice canyon with icicle formations

events.description: enters narrow ice canyon with towering walls and frozen waterfalls
engages in combat with large mechanical beast with glowing red components

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight ice canyon then engaging a mechanical beast in open snow, circling the enemy on the mount

notable_agents.action: mechanical beast with glowing red appendages attacking the player

entered.detail: tall vertical rock walls covered in ice and snow
large icicles hanging from canyon ceiling
frozen cascade of ice on the canyon wall
large hostile machine with red glowing components and long appendages

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into an enclosed ice canyon with towering walls covered in icicles and frozen waterfalls. The lighting becomes more diffused as the canyon walls block the sky. Emerging from the canyon, the character immediately engages in combat with a large mechanical beast in an open snowy area surrounded by pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep mountain ascent to panoramic peak

events.description: reaches mountain peak and slows to reveal panoramic valley view
begins descending from peak into snowy forested area

agents.ego_description: climbing steep snowy mountain path, pausing at the peak to overlook the vast valley below, then beginning descent

entered.detail: expansive view of distant mountains and valleys covered in clouds
wide vista showing the landscape below with mist and distant peaks
snowy mountain summit where the character pauses

segments.scene_description: Following the combat, the character ascends a steep snow-covered mountain path, reaching a peak that reveals a breathtaking panoramic view of the valley below with clouds and distant mountain ranges. The segment transitions from the ascent to the beginning of the descent into a snow-covered forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest descent with dense pine trees

events.description: dialogue text appears on screen indicating narrative progression

agents.ego_description: riding down through dense snowy forest with snow-laden pine trees, navigating winding paths

entered.detail: thick forest of snow-covered pine trees lining the path
ruined structure or building visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: Descending through a dense snowy forest with heavy snow on the pine trees, the character rides along a winding path. Dialogue text appears on screen indicating story progression, and a distant structure becomes visible through the trees as the elevation decreases.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien settlement entrance with bioluminescent architecture

events.description: enters area with vibrant purple and pink alien structures and settlement architecture

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering an alien settlement with colorful bioluminescent structures and carved stone walls

entered.detail: bioluminescent purple and pink alien growths attached to rock walls
structures with vibrant teal and purple organic-like formations
wooden platforms and walkways built into the cliffside
carved stone structures integrated with the mountain

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a distinctive alien settlement characterized by vibrant purple and pink bioluminescent structures growing from the rocks. The character rides through an entrance flanked by these colorful alien formations, wooden scaffolding, and carved stone walls, entering the settlement known as The Memorial Grove.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a frozen wilderness that transforms from a wide mountain valley into a bioluminescent alien settlement. It begins with a mechanical mount traversing a snowy expanse dotted with purple flora and red grass, moving steadily toward the mouth of a narrow ice canyon. As the camera enters the canyon, the environment closes in with towering icicles and frozen waterfalls before breaking open into a pine-covered clearing for a combat encounter with a mechanical beast. The scene then ascends a steep mountain path to a panoramic peak overlooking distant ranges, subsequently descending through a dense, snow-laden forest where a mysterious structure emerges through the trees. Finally, the path leads directly into the Memorial Grove, where the snowy landscape gives way to vibrant purple and pink bioluminescent architecture and carved stone walls.
